claims.text: DBS is a leading financial services group in Asia with a presence in 19 markets.
claims.source_sentence: DBS is a leading financial services group in Asia with a presence in 19 markets.

claims.text: DBS has been accorded the “Safest Bank in Asia“ award by Global Finance for 16 consecutive years from 2009 to 2024.
claims.source_sentence: DBS has been accorded the “Safest Bank in Asia“ award by Global Finance for 16 consecutive years from 2009 to 2024.

claims.text: DBS has been awarded the “World’s Best Bank for Sustainable Finance” by Global Finance for the first time and retained the title “Best Bank for Sustainable Finance in Asia-Pacific” for the second consecutive year.
claims.source_sentence: DBS has been awarded the “World’s Best Bank for Sustainable Finance” by Global Finance for the first time and retained the title “Best Bank for Sustainable Finance in Asia-Pacific” for the second consecutive year.

claims.text: This report covers the sustainability-related principles, initiatives and performance of our operations across our core markets for the financial year 1 January to 31 December 2024, unless otherwise stated in the sections of this report where relevant.
claims.source_sentence: This report covers the sustainability-related principles, initiatives and performance of our operations across our core markets for the financial year 1 January to 31 December 2024, unless otherwise stated in the sections of this report where relevant.

claims.text: Our sustainability reporting processes are subjected to internal review, with selected indicators also subjected to external assurance as detailed on pages 119 to 120.
claims.source_sentence: Our sustainability reporting processes are subjected to internal review, with selected indicators also subjected to external assurance as detailed on pages 119 to 120.

claims.text: The report is to be read in conjunction with the Annual Report 2024 and other sustainability-related disclosures on our website.
claims.source_sentence: The report is to be read in conjunction with the Annual Report 2024 and other sustainability-related disclosures on our website.

claims.text: We welcome feedback on this report and any aspect of our sustainability performance.
claims.source_sentence: We welcome feedback on this report and any aspect of our sustainability performance.

claims.text: This Sustainability Report is approved by the Board and prepared in accordance with or with reference to the following regulations, standards and guidelines: Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited (SGX-ST) Listing Rules 711A and 711B on Sustainability Report, and Practice Note 7.6 Sustainability Reporting Guide (updated January 2025).
claims.source_sentence: This Sustainability Report is approved by the Board and prepared in accordance with or with reference to the following regulations, standards and guidelines: Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited (SGX-ST) Listing Rules 711A and 711B on Sustainability Report, and Practice Note 7.6 Sustainability Reporting Guide (updated January 2025).

claims.text: The Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) recommendations(1) by the Financial Stability Board (updated October 2021).
claims.source_sentence: The Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures (TCFD) recommendations(1) by the Financial Stability Board (updated October 2021).

claims.text: The Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards 2021.
claims.source_sentence: The Global Reporting Initiative (GRI) Standards 2021.

claims.text: The Financial Institutions Climate-related Disclosure Document under the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS)-convened Green Finance Industry Taskforce (published May 2021).
claims.source_sentence: The Financial Institutions Climate-related Disclosure Document under the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS)-convened Green Finance Industry Taskforce (published May 2021).

claims.text: The Guidelines for Climate Target Setting for Banks by the UN Environment Programme – Finance Initiative (issued April 2021).
claims.source_sentence: The Guidelines for Climate Target Setting for Banks by the UN Environment Programme – Finance Initiative (issued April 2021).

claims.text: The Guidelines on Responsible Financing issued in October 2015 by the Association of Banks in Singapore (revised June 2018).
claims.source_sentence: The Guidelines on Responsible Financing issued in October 2015 by the Association of Banks in Singapore (revised June 2018).

claims.text: The Sustainability Accounting Standards Board (SASB) standards based on the three SICS industries within the Financials sector most aligned with our mix of businesses: Commercial Banks (FN-CB), Consumer Finance (FN-CF) and Mortgage Finance (FN-MF).
claims.source_sentence: The Sustainability Accounting Standards Board (SASB) standards based on the three SICS industries within the Financials sector most aligned with our mix of businesses: Commercial Banks (FN-CB), Consumer Finance (FN-CF) and Mortgage Finance (FN-MF).

claims.text: We have given consideration to the disclosure requirements of the IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards issued by the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB).
claims.source_sentence: We have given consideration to the disclosure requirements of the IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards issued by the International Sustainability Standards Board (ISSB).

claims.text: We will progressively enhance our sustainability and climate-related disclosures aligned with IFRS Sustainability Disclosures Standards, as mandated by SGX RegCo.
claims.source_sentence: We will progressively enhance our sustainability and climate-related disclosures aligned with IFRS Sustainability Disclosures Standards, as mandated by SGX RegCo.

claims.text: 2024 was confirmed by many groups including NASA and the European Copernicus Climate Change Service to be the warmest year on record globally, and likely the first calendar year that the average global temperature exceeded 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels.
claims.source_sentence: 2024 was confirmed by many groups including NASA and the European Copernicus Climate Change Service to be the warmest year on record globally, and likely the first calendar year that the average global temperature exceeded 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels.

claims.text: According to the World Meteorological Organisation, the past ten years were the ten warmest years on record.
claims.source_sentence: According to the World Meteorological Organisation, the past ten years were the ten warmest years on record.

claims.text: According to Munich Re, natural disasters caused total losses of USD 320 billion in 2024, of which only USD 140 billion was insured.
claims.source_sentence: According to Munich Re, natural disasters caused total losses of USD 320 billion in 2024, of which only USD 140 billion was insured.

claims.text: According to the International Energy Agency, last years’ global investments in clean energy were around double the amount going into fossil fuels.
claims.source_sentence: According to the International Energy Agency, last years’ global investments in clean energy were around double the amount going into fossil fuels.

claims.text: Singapore has consistently supported a comprehensive climate agenda.
claims.source_sentence: Singapore has consistently supported a comprehensive climate agenda.

claims.text: Its Government committed up to USD 500 million in concessional funding to support the Financing Asia’s Transition Partnership (FAST-P), a blended finance initiative that will support Asia’s decarbonisation and climate resilience.
claims.source_sentence: Its Government committed up to USD 500 million in concessional funding to support the Financing Asia’s Transition Partnership (FAST-P), a blended finance initiative that will support Asia’s decarbonisation and climate resilience.

claims.text: China hit its 2030 wind and solar targets six years ahead of time, while also accelerating nuclear power deployment, creating the world’s largest carbon market and increasing the country’s forest coverage from 10% in 1949 to 25% in 2024.
claims.source_sentence: China hit its 2030 wind and solar targets six years ahead of time, while also accelerating nuclear power deployment, creating the world’s largest carbon market and increasing the country’s forest coverage from 10% in 1949 to 25% in 2024.

claims.text: India, benefitting from strong efforts in recent years, is expected to surpass a clean energy share of 50% in the country’s total power generation in 2025.
claims.source_sentence: India, benefitting from strong efforts in recent years, is expected to surpass a clean energy share of 50% in the country’s total power generation in 2025.

claims.text: India also continues to make strides in other areas such as the electrification of mobility and battery storage.
claims.source_sentence: India also continues to make strides in other areas such as the electrification of mobility and battery storage.

claims.text: As an Asia-centric bank, we have an important role to play in supporting the balancing of social, economic and environmental priorities in the region, providing the essential financing required to drive sustainable development.
claims.source_sentence: As an Asia-centric bank, we have an important role to play in supporting the balancing of social, economic and environmental priorities in the region, providing the essential financing required to drive sustainable development.

claims.text: Combating climate change in Asia while ensuring a just and inclusive transition that improves the living standards of its growing population, is a formidable challenge.
claims.source_sentence: Combating climate change in Asia while ensuring a just and inclusive transition that improves the living standards of its growing population, is a formidable challenge.

claims.text: This requires a nuanced approach which takes into consideration the region’s unique and diverse social and developmental contexts.
claims.source_sentence: This requires a nuanced approach which takes into consideration the region’s unique and diverse social and developmental contexts.

claims.text: While there have been some setbacks in global climate commitments, DBS remains committed to supporting climate action for a low-carbon and climate-resilient economy.
claims.source_sentence: While there have been some setbacks in global climate commitments, DBS remains committed to supporting climate action for a low-carbon and climate-resilient economy.

claims.text: Importantly, we recognise that we cannot achieve our ambition and commitments alone.
claims.source_sentence: Importantly, we recognise that we cannot achieve our ambition and commitments alone.

claims.text: Our ability to support the just transition to net zero depends on changes in the real economy, from policy and regulatory developments to the adoption of new technologies that transform current modes of production, all underpinned by support from the community-at-large.
claims.source_sentence: Our ability to support the just transition to net zero depends on changes in the real economy, from policy and regulatory developments to the adoption of new technologies that transform current modes of production, all underpinned by support from the community-at-large.

claims.text: As such, in addition to providing innovative financing solutions for our clients, we also engage and partner with key ecosystem players, in Asia and globally, to foster collective action and collaboration across value chains and national borders.
claims.source_sentence: As such, in addition to providing innovative financing solutions for our clients, we also engage and partner with key ecosystem players, in Asia and globally, to foster collective action and collaboration across value chains and national borders.

claims.text: We continued doing this via our three sustainability pillars: (1) Responsible Banking that seeks to empower our clients to become more sustainable and to promote greater access to essential financial services, (2) Responsible Business Practices that focuses on how we conduct ourselves as an organisation and (3) Impact Beyond Banking that aims to uplift the lives and livelihoods of those in need, as well as to spark employee volunteerism.
claims.source_sentence: We continued doing this via our three sustainability pillars: (1) Responsible Banking that seeks to empower our clients to become more sustainable and to promote greater access to essential financial services, (2) Responsible Business Practices that focuses on how we conduct ourselves as an organisation and (3) Impact Beyond Banking that aims to uplift the lives and livelihoods of those in need, as well as to spark employee volunteerism.

claims.text: In our Responsible Banking pillar, we further expanded our client engagement with large corporate customers to support their transition to lower carbon business models.
claims.source_sentence: In our Responsible Banking pillar, we further expanded our client engagement with large corporate customers to support their transition to lower carbon business models.

claims.text: Importantly, we recognise that achieving net zero in our markets requires not only growing the green economy, such as renewable energy, but also greening the entire economy.
claims.source_sentence: Importantly, we recognise that achieving net zero in our markets requires not only growing the green economy, such as renewable energy, but also greening the entire economy.

claims.text: For DBS, this means to strategically channel finance to high-emitting activities, either to accelerate their shut down, or if possible, to accelerate their transition to low-carbon alternatives.
claims.source_sentence: For DBS, this means to strategically channel finance to high-emitting activities, either to accelerate their shut down, or if possible, to accelerate their transition to low-carbon alternatives.

claims.text: Hence, we materially enhanced our approach and governance related to transition finance, and refined the list of eligible activities we will support.
claims.source_sentence: Hence, we materially enhanced our approach and governance related to transition finance, and refined the list of eligible activities we will support.

claims.text: We believe financial innovation and new sources of capital will be critical to accelerate the just transition in Asia.
claims.source_sentence: We believe financial innovation and new sources of capital will be critical to accelerate the just transition in Asia.

claims.text: Hence, we supported a wider ecosystem approach to this via various advocacy efforts.
claims.source_sentence: Hence, we supported a wider ecosystem approach to this via various advocacy efforts.

claims.text: For instance, DBS has been co-leading the transition finance working group of the Singapore Sustainable Finance Association, which aims to position Singapore as a regional transition finance hub.
claims.source_sentence: For instance, DBS has been co-leading the transition finance working group of the Singapore Sustainable Finance Association, which aims to position Singapore as a regional transition finance hub.

claims.text: DBS has also co-led a working group in the MAS-convened Transition Credits Coalition (TRACTION), which aims to support the early and managed phaseout of thermal coal power plants across the region by catalysing the generation of a new finance instrument, high integrity transition credits.
claims.source_sentence: DBS has also co-led a working group in the MAS-convened Transition Credits Coalition (TRACTION), which aims to support the early and managed phaseout of thermal coal power plants across the region by catalysing the generation of a new finance instrument, high integrity transition credits.

claims.text: Our sustainable financing commitments (for loans and trade finance), net of repayments, stood at around SGD 89 billion as of December 2024, up from SGD 70 billion in the previous year.
claims.source_sentence: Our sustainable financing commitments (for loans and trade finance), net of repayments, stood at around SGD 89 billion as of December 2024, up from SGD 70 billion in the previous year.

claims.text: We also facilitated SGD 38 billion of sustainable bond issuances in 2024.
claims.source_sentence: We also facilitated SGD 38 billion of sustainable bond issuances in 2024.

claims.text: The efforts to help our clients in their decarbonisation journeys were recognised, and DBS is honoured to be named “World’s Best Bank for Sustainable Finance” by Global Finance for the first time.
claims.source_sentence: The efforts to help our clients in their decarbonisation journeys were recognised, and DBS is honoured to be named “World’s Best Bank for Sustainable Finance” by Global Finance for the first time.

claims.text: In addition to our focus on large corporates, we doubled down on our efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts.
claims.source_sentence: In addition to our focus on large corporates, we doubled down on our efforts to help SMEs in their sustainability efforts.

claims.text: We leveraged the work of past years including several strategic partnerships with industry leaders in markets like India and Hong Kong, and translated these into financing solutions for our SME customers.
claims.source_sentence: We leveraged the work of past years including several strategic partnerships with industry leaders in markets like India and Hong Kong, and translated these into financing solutions for our SME customers.

claims.text: Additionally, we established the ESG Ready Programme, a new initiative in Singapore which provides our customers with a holistic ecosystem of support, connecting them with solution providers and guiding them to integrate sustainability into business strategies.
claims.source_sentence: Additionally, we established the ESG Ready Programme, a new initiative in Singapore which provides our customers with a holistic ecosystem of support, connecting them with solution providers and guiding them to integrate sustainability into business strategies.

claims.text: Overall, we almost doubled our sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.
claims.source_sentence: Overall, we almost doubled our sustainable finance volumes to Mid-Cap and SME customers last year.

claims.text: Complementing all these efforts on client engagement, we also further strengthened our ESG risk management capabilities and governance.
claims.source_sentence: Complementing all these efforts on client engagement, we also further strengthened our ESG risk management capabilities and governance.

claims.text: We launched a new accredited training programme to equip relationship managers and credit risk managers with the skills to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.
claims.source_sentence: We launched a new accredited training programme to equip relationship managers and credit risk managers with the skills to integrate ESG principles into client strategy and financial risk assessments.

claims.text: We started to leverage Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.
claims.source_sentence: We started to leverage Gen AI for data analytics and ESG risk management processes.

claims.text: To ensure robust governance to oversee the execution of our climate strategy and embed our net zero commitment into our business, we set up the Group Climate Council.
claims.source_sentence: To ensure robust governance to oversee the execution of our climate strategy and embed our net zero commitment into our business, we set up the Group Climate Council.

claims.text: In our Consumer Banking Group, we continued empowering customers to make more conscious choices and to encourage more sustainable lifestyles.
claims.source_sentence: In our Consumer Banking Group, we continued empowering customers to make more conscious choices and to encourage more sustainable lifestyles.

claims.text: Since 2021, more than 2.2 million customers engaged on LiveBetter, our one-stop digital portal that offers insights on sustainability and connects customers with solutions that support financial planning, wealth democratisation, as well as environmental and social impact.
claims.source_sentence: Since 2021, more than 2.2 million customers engaged on LiveBetter, our one-stop digital portal that offers insights on sustainability and connects customers with solutions that support financial planning, wealth democratisation, as well as environmental and social impact.

claims.text: Our customers also invested over SGD 42 million in sustainable funds and ETFs via Invest Better and contributed more than SGD 2.7 million via Give Better to environmental and social causes.
claims.source_sentence: Our customers also invested over SGD 42 million in sustainable funds and ETFs via Invest Better and contributed more than SGD 2.7 million via Give Better to environmental and social causes.

claims.text: We also continued providing inclusive financial services to underserved communities.
claims.source_sentence: We also continued providing inclusive financial services to underserved communities.

claims.text: For instance, we disbursed more than SGD 1 billion in loans to low-income individuals in Indonesia as well as SGD 3.4 billion in loans through Priority Sector Lending in India.
claims.source_sentence: For instance, we disbursed more than SGD 1 billion in loans to low-income individuals in Indonesia as well as SGD 3.4 billion in loans through Priority Sector Lending in India.

claims.text: Furthermore, we provided 4,000 unsecured loans totalling SGD 500 million to micro and small businesses in Singapore.
claims.source_sentence: Furthermore, we provided 4,000 unsecured loans totalling SGD 500 million to micro and small businesses in Singapore.

claims.text: In our Responsible Business Practices pillar, we remained committed to providing a working environment where employees feel purposeful, connected, cared for, valued and invested in.
claims.source_sentence: In our Responsible Business Practices pillar, we remained committed to providing a working environment where employees feel purposeful, connected, cared for, valued and invested in.

claims.text: While there has been debate on the topic of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI), especially in the United States, our belief remains unchanged.
claims.source_sentence: While there has been debate on the topic of Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI), especially in the United States, our belief remains unchanged.

claims.text: A diverse and inclusive workforce supports the creation of long-term value for our stakeholders, as part of our holistic strategy to attract top talent, build high performing teams and deliver exceptional work.
claims.source_sentence: A diverse and inclusive workforce supports the creation of long-term value for our stakeholders, as part of our holistic strategy to attract top talent, build high performing teams and deliver exceptional work.

claims.text: Our approach has always been based on promoting equal opportunity across all our people programmes and practices.
claims.source_sentence: Our approach has always been based on promoting equal opportunity across all our people programmes and practices.

claims.text: All this allowed us to accomplish a record 91% employee engagement score in the My Voice survey, demonstrating the effectiveness of our employee value proposition, and fostering a highly engaged workforce.
claims.source_sentence: All this allowed us to accomplish a record 91% employee engagement score in the My Voice survey, demonstrating the effectiveness of our employee value proposition, and fostering a highly engaged workforce.

claims.text: This result is 17 percentage points above the APAC Financial Services Industry benchmark and six percentage points above the APAC Best Employers benchmark.
claims.source_sentence: This result is 17 percentage points above the APAC Financial Services Industry benchmark and six percentage points above the APAC Best Employers benchmark.

claims.text: We also further refined the decarbonisation strategy related to our own operations and established interim decarbonisation targets.
claims.source_sentence: We also further refined the decarbonisation strategy related to our own operations and established interim decarbonisation targets.

claims.text: Furthermore, we continued to strengthen tech resilience, while also investing in our tech capabilities such as Gen AI.
claims.source_sentence: Furthermore, we continued to strengthen tech resilience, while also investing in our tech capabilities such as Gen AI.

claims.text: With the increasing prevalence of Gen AI, we have further enhanced our AI governance through the expanded Responsible Data Use Framework and a Responsible AI playbook for Gen AI, as well as collaborative initiatives with regulators and industry partners.
claims.source_sentence: With the increasing prevalence of Gen AI, we have further enhanced our AI governance through the expanded Responsible Data Use Framework and a Responsible AI playbook for Gen AI, as well as collaborative initiatives with regulators and industry partners.

claims.text: In our Impact Beyond Banking pillar, building on a decade of creating impact through the DBS Foundation, we focused on implementing a new strategy and governance, as well as forging new strategic partnerships to deliver on the upsized commitment to allocate up to SGD 1 billion over the next ten years to uplift vulnerable communities in Asia.
claims.source_sentence: In our Impact Beyond Banking pillar, building on a decade of creating impact through the DBS Foundation, we focused on implementing a new strategy and governance, as well as forging new strategic partnerships to deliver on the upsized commitment to allocate up to SGD 1 billion over the next ten years to uplift vulnerable communities in Asia.

claims.text: In 2024, we already committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focussed on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.
claims.source_sentence: In 2024, we already committed SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focussed on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.

claims.text: We also continued to nurture a culture of giving back.
claims.source_sentence: We also continued to nurture a culture of giving back.

claims.text: Our employees dedicated over 270,000 volunteer hours to community initiatives.
claims.source_sentence: Our employees dedicated over 270,000 volunteer hours to community initiatives.

claims.text: In 2024, our employee volunteerism programme was honoured with the Overall Winner award at the 9th Shorty Impact Award.
claims.source_sentence: In 2024, our employee volunteerism programme was honoured with the Overall Winner award at the 9th Shorty Impact Award.

claims.text: Finally, we continued our commitment to enhancing community wellbeing by easing cost of living pressures of lower-income households in Singapore and supporting heartland businesses.
claims.source_sentence: Finally, we continued our commitment to enhancing community wellbeing by easing cost of living pressures of lower-income households in Singapore and supporting heartland businesses.

claims.text: In 2024, more than SGD 14 million was subsidised through the DBS Hawker Meals initiative and the POSB Support Our Heartlands programme.
claims.source_sentence: In 2024, more than SGD 14 million was subsidised through the DBS Hawker Meals initiative and the POSB Support Our Heartlands programme.

claims.text: Being purpose-driven is part of our DNA.
claims.source_sentence: Being purpose-driven is part of our DNA.

claims.text: Building on our rich heritage, founded as the Development Bank for Singapore, we have always believed in the importance of being a force for good in the communities we serve, by enriching lives, transforming businesses and driving sustainable outcomes.
claims.source_sentence: Building on our rich heritage, founded as the Development Bank for Singapore, we have always believed in the importance of being a force for good in the communities we serve, by enriching lives, transforming businesses and driving sustainable outcomes.

claims.text: We translated this into our vision to become the Best Bank for a Better World.
claims.source_sentence: We translated this into our vision to become the Best Bank for a Better World.

claims.text: Based on the conviction that we can do well by doing good, we have embraced sustainability as a driver of future growth, building on our strong foundation as an Asian-centric and digital bank.
claims.source_sentence: Based on the conviction that we can do well by doing good, we have embraced sustainability as a driver of future growth, building on our strong foundation as an Asian-centric and digital bank.

claims.text: Today’s world is complex and changing ever more rapidly.
claims.source_sentence: Today’s world is complex and changing ever more rapidly.

claims.text: The challenges we face are formidable.
claims.source_sentence: The challenges we face are formidable.

claims.text: Notwithstanding this, I am encouraged by DBS employees, as well as our clients and partners, exemplifying resilience and the ability to adapt and innovate, fostering collective action.
claims.source_sentence: Notwithstanding this, I am encouraged by DBS employees, as well as our clients and partners, exemplifying resilience and the ability to adapt and innovate, fostering collective action.

claims.text: Building on this, I am confident that we can jointly support Asia’s transition to a net zero future, assuring that people can live healthier and more fulfilled lives, for generations to come.
claims.source_sentence: Building on this, I am confident that we can jointly support Asia’s transition to a net zero future, assuring that people can live healthier and more fulfilled lives, for generations to come.

claims.text: We continue to see good progress, with five out of seven sectors on track against the reference scenarios set.
claims.source_sentence: We continue to see good progress, with five out of seven sectors on track against the reference scenarios set.

claims.text: However, we also recognise many challenges such as the availability of commercially viable decarbonisation technologies, and dependencies such as an enabling policy and regulatory environment for decarbonisation efforts.
claims.source_sentence: However, we also recognise many challenges such as the availability of commercially viable decarbonisation technologies, and dependencies such as an enabling policy and regulatory environment for decarbonisation efforts.

claims.text: This is specifically true in sectors such as Steel and Shipping, where we are not yet on track against the reference scenarios.
claims.source_sentence: This is specifically true in sectors such as Steel and Shipping, where we are not yet on track against the reference scenarios.

claims.text: Addressing these challenges and dependencies will often need broader ecosystem partnerships across the public and private sectors.
claims.source_sentence: Addressing these challenges and dependencies will often need broader ecosystem partnerships across the public and private sectors.

claims.text: We remain committed to working with our clients and fostering partnerships to enable a just and inclusive transition to net zero.
claims.source_sentence: We remain committed to working with our clients and fostering partnerships to enable a just and inclusive transition to net zero.

claims.text: Supported Mid-Caps and SMEs on their sustainability journeys through strategic ecosystem partnerships across markets and new initiatives, such as the ESG Ready Programme in Singapore, almost doubling sustainable finance volumes.
claims.source_sentence: Supported Mid-Caps and SMEs on their sustainability journeys through strategic ecosystem partnerships across markets and new initiatives, such as the ESG Ready Programme in Singapore, almost doubling sustainable finance volumes.

claims.text: Engaged > 2.2 million customers through LiveBetter platform, our one-stop digital platform for sustainable lifestyle and financial solutions, since November 2021.
claims.source_sentence: Engaged > 2.2 million customers through LiveBetter platform, our one-stop digital platform for sustainable lifestyle and financial solutions, since November 2021.

claims.text: Disbursed > SGD 1 billion in loans to low-income individuals in Indonesia, as part of our efforts to democratise banking services in Asia.
claims.source_sentence: Disbursed > SGD 1 billion in loans to low-income individuals in Indonesia, as part of our efforts to democratise banking services in Asia.

claims.text: ~ 4,000 unsecured loans totalling SGD 500 million to MSMEs in Singapore to support their working capital needs.
claims.source_sentence: ~ 4,000 unsecured loans totalling SGD 500 million to MSMEs in Singapore to support their working capital needs.

claims.text: ~ SGD 3.4 billion in loans through Priority Sector Lending, supporting economic and social development in India.
claims.source_sentence: ~ SGD 3.4 billion in loans through Priority Sector Lending, supporting economic and social development in India.

claims.text: Achieved 91% employee engagement score in My Voice survey, 17 percentage points above the APAC Financial Services Industry benchmark.
claims.source_sentence: Achieved 91% employee engagement score in My Voice survey, 17 percentage points above the APAC Financial Services Industry benchmark.

claims.text: Engaged > 33,000 employees through Live Fulfilled Carnival to cultivate a growth mindset and advance their careers.
claims.source_sentence: Engaged > 33,000 employees through Live Fulfilled Carnival to cultivate a growth mindset and advance their careers.

claims.text: Equipped > 22,000 employees with foundational sustainability knowledge, including climate-related topics, and conducted full-day trainings for more than 200 senior country management leaders.
claims.source_sentence: Equipped > 22,000 employees with foundational sustainability knowledge, including climate-related topics, and conducted full-day trainings for more than 200 senior country management leaders.

claims.text: Enhanced Operational decarbonisation roadmap to drive greater energy efficiency measures across our leased and owned assets.
claims.source_sentence: Enhanced Operational decarbonisation roadmap to drive greater energy efficiency measures across our leased and owned assets.

claims.text: Launched Inaugural regenerative festival engaging employees, including procurement managers, and suppliers to inspire new ways of sourcing and consuming.
claims.source_sentence: Launched Inaugural regenerative festival engaging employees, including procurement managers, and suppliers to inspire new ways of sourcing and consuming.

claims.text: Enhanced AI governance through expanded Responsible Data Use Framework and the creation of a Responsible AI playbook for Gen AI.
claims.source_sentence: Enhanced AI governance through expanded Responsible Data Use Framework and the creation of a Responsible AI playbook for Gen AI.

claims.text: Subsidised > SGD 14 million worth of everyday purchases for our customers through DBS Hawker Meals and POSB Support Our Heartlands programmes.
claims.source_sentence: Subsidised > SGD 14 million worth of everyday purchases for our customers through DBS Hawker Meals and POSB Support Our Heartlands programmes.

claims.text: Delivered > 270,000 volunteering hours driving employee engagement to embed the culture of giving.
claims.source_sentence: Delivered > 270,000 volunteering hours driving employee engagement to embed the culture of giving.

claims.text: Committed > SGD 100 million comprising SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focused on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.
claims.source_sentence: Committed > SGD 100 million comprising SGD 98.1 million in funding to support multi-year programmes focused on two key themes, providing essential needs and fostering inclusion, while additionally granting SGD 4.5 million to Businesses for Impact.

claims.text: Launched DBS Foundation Impact Beyond series bringing together actors from the public, private and social sectors to tackle Asia’s ageing challenge.
claims.source_sentence: Launched DBS Foundation Impact Beyond series bringing together actors from the public, private and social sectors to tackle Asia’s ageing challenge.

claims.text: Enhanced Transition Finance Framework including a refined list of eligible activities and strengthened governance to accelerate the just transition in Asia.
claims.source_sentence: Enhanced Transition Finance Framework including a refined list of eligible activities and strengthened governance to accelerate the just transition in Asia.

claims.text: Committed SGD 89 billion in sustainable financing, net of repayments, as of December 2024.
claims.source_sentence: Committed SGD 89 billion in sustainable financing, net of repayments, as of December 2024.

claims.text: DBS also facilitated SGD 38 billion in sustainable bond issuances as an active bookrunner in 2024.
claims.source_sentence: DBS also facilitated SGD 38 billion in sustainable bond issuances as an active bookrunner in 2024.

claims.text: Guided by our vision to be the “Best Bank for a Better World”, DBS seeks to create long-term value for stakeholders in a sustainable way.
claims.source_sentence: Guided by our vision to be the “Best Bank for a Better World”, DBS seeks to create long-term value for stakeholders in a sustainable way.

claims.text: We do this by using our resources to build competitive advantages that unlock new business opportunities for sustainable value creation.
claims.source_sentence: We do this by using our resources to build competitive advantages that unlock new business opportunities for sustainable value creation.

claims.text: Supporting sustainable development In line with our sustainability strategy, we are committed to drive progress towards achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
claims.source_sentence: Supporting sustainable development In line with our sustainability strategy, we are committed to drive progress towards achieving the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

claims.text: All 17 interrelated goals represent an ambitious sustainability agenda by 2030.
claims.source_sentence: All 17 interrelated goals represent an ambitious sustainability agenda by 2030.

claims.text: We have chosen to focus on the following six SDGs, which we believe we can make the most impact on: SDG 3 (Good Health and Well-being), SDG 4 (Quality Education), SDG 5 (Gender Equality), SDG 8 (Decent Work and Economic Growth), SDG 13 (Climate Action) and SDG 17 (Partnerships for the Goals).
claims.source_sentence: We have chosen to focus on the following six SDGs, which we believe we can make the most impact on: SDG 3 (Good Health and Well-being), SDG 4 (Quality Education), SDG 5 (Gender Equality), SDG 8 (Decent Work and Economic Growth), SDG 13 (Climate Action) and SDG 17 (Partnerships for the Goals).
